description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the front entrance. The building features a cross-gabled roof with a moderate pitch, covered in grayish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with dark trim around the windows and doors. Large windows are present on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior, while the rear has a smaller window. The property is bordered by green lawn areas and is adjacent to paved streets on two sides. The overall design is simple and functional, with a modern yet classic suburban appearance.
description: A single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled roof, light exterior walls, and large front windows, set on a green lawn with paved walkways and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the paved walkway leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the cross-gabled roof, and three vertical structures behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small window and the continuation of the paved area around the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and the paved driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
